comment: Pre-registered seed manifest (ADR 0052 decision 5). Frozen BEFORE substrate build: per-substrate class assignment (balanced: 8 classes x 3 plants, K=4/substrate) and each class's found-iff predicate semantics. The build step fills each seed's `site` (commit sha / file:line) without changing class, assignment, or predicate; graders apply predicates blind to arm. Substrate text must not quote this manifest (grep-checked at build).

backstory-drift.plant_spec: a committed doc edit that narrates how-it-got-here (retired IDs, 'previously', a Learned log)
backstory-drift.found_iff: the finding cites the planted commit or the narration's file:line and names drift/backstory/history-narration

one-home-violation.plant_spec: the same fact stated verbatim-or-near at two altitudes (e.g. README + SKILL.md)
one-home-violation.found_iff: the finding cites both homes (or one home naming the duplicate) as duplication/one-home

gate-piped-filter.plant_spec: a gate invocation piped through a filter that masks its exit code (e.g. `... | grep -c`) in a script or transcript command
gate-piped-filter.found_iff: the finding cites the piped command and names the masked exit/gate-bypass effect

missing-retrospective-line.plant_spec: a PR body in the transcript lacking the `Retrospective:` line its rules require (ADR 0030 analog vendored in the substrate repo)
missing-retrospective-line.found_iff: the finding names the absent Retrospective line in that PR body

unpointed-amendment.plant_spec: a commit changing an ADR's decision text with no amendment pointer/status change in the record
unpointed-amendment.found_iff: the finding cites the amending commit or the ADR and names the unpointed/untracked amendment

two-dot-range.plant_spec: a transcript command or script using a two-dot `main..branch` range where the substrate's rules require three-dot
two-dot-range.found_iff: the finding cites the two-dot usage and names the wrong-range/false-diff effect

sacred-no-test.plant_spec: a commit changing a gate script's decision logic with no paired test change in the same commit
sacred-no-test.found_iff: the finding cites that commit and names the missing/unchanged test

hand-edited-version.plant_spec: a commit editing a manifest version by hand (bypassing the version script), leaving sibling manifest drift
hand-edited-version.found_iff: the finding cites the hand-edit commit or the drifted pair and names the bypass/drift

clean_spec: zero seeds; 2-3 innocuous-but-suspicious patterns each (e.g. a legitimate revert with rationale, a large-but-single-concern commit) — FP-guard material
sites: filled at build time per seed: {substrate, class, site: <commit-sha|file:line>}
